output.code: import json, re, os, textwrap, unicodedata, itertools, math, statistics, collections, difflib, sys, pprint, random
import json, os, pandas as pd, numpy as np

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)

type(quran_data), len(quran_data)

# Show keys for first item
quran_data[0].keys(), quran_data[0]

def normalize_arabic(s):
    # Remove diacritics and tatweel, unify hamza forms, remove punctuation, lowercase
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # remove tashkeel (arabic diacritics)
    arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')
    # normalize hamza/alef
    s = re.sub('[إأآا]', 'ا', s)
    s = re.sub('[يى]', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('[ؤئ]', 'ء', s)
    # remove non-letters and digits; keep spaces
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

orig_full = "إِنَّ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمَاتِ وَالْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَالْقَانِتِينَ وَالْقَانِتَاتِ وَالصَّادِقِينَ وَالصَّادِقَاتِ وَالصَّابِرِينَ وَالصَّابِرَاتِ وَالْخَاشِعِينَ وَالْخَاشِعَاتِ وَالْمُتَصَدِّقِينَ وَالْمُتَصَدِّقَاتِ وَالصَّائِمِينَ وَالصَّائِمَاتِ وَالْحَافِظِينَ فُرُوجَهُمْ وَالْحَافِظَاتِ وَالذَّاكِرِينَ اللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَالذَّاكِرَاتِ"
snippet = "إِنَّ الْم...َّاكِرَاتِ"
print(orig_full)
print("norm len", len(normalize_arabic(orig_full)), normalize_arabic(orig_full)[:100])

# Build normalized index for quran verses
norm_index = [normalize_arabic(item['ayah_text']) for item in quran_data]
# Search for substring presence
target_norm = normalize_arabic(orig_full)
matches = []
for i, ni in enumerate(norm_index):
    if target_norm in ni or ni in target_norm or len(set(target_norm.split()) & set(ni.split())) > 4:
        # record some metrics
        matches.append((i, ni))
len(matches)

# Show candidates
cands = []
for i, ni in matches:
    cands.append((i, quran_data[i]['surah_id'], quran_data[i]['surah_name'], quran_data[i]['ayah_id'], quran_data[i]['ayah_text']))
cands

def token_f1(a, b):
    # compute precision, recall using token multiset counts
    a_tokens = normalize_arabic(a).split()
    b_tokens = normalize_arabic(b).split()
    ca = collections.Counter(a_tokens)
    cb = collections.Counter(b_tokens)
    inter = sum((ca & cb).values())
    prec = inter / (len(b_tokens) if b_tokens else 1)
    rec = inter / (len(a_tokens) if a_tokens else 1)
    if prec + rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2 * prec * rec / (prec + rec)

cand = cands[-1][-1]  # ayah_text
f1 = token_f1(orig_full, cand)
len_orig = len(normalize_arabic(orig_full).split())
len_cand = len(normalize_arabic(cand).split())
f1, len_orig, len_cand
